title: In Parliament | Jesse Norman
text_excerpt: In Parliament | Jesse Norman Skip to main content Main navigation Home About In Parliament News Articles Contact Search Cleaning Up the Wye NMITE User account menu Log in Toggle navigation Main navigation Home About In Parliament News Articles Contact Search Cleaning Up the Wye NMITE In Parliament Jesse Norman's contributions in Parliament, speeches, questions and debate interventions. In Parliament Image Jesse Norman welcomes report on access to Parliament and its procedures 16 April 2026 Shadow Leader of the House Jesse Norman welcomes the Modernisation Committee’s report on access to the House of Commons and its Procedures and the administration’s response. Image Jesse Norman demands apology for PM’s contempt of Parliament and grills Government on delayed Defence Investment Plan 16 April 2026 Shadow Leader of the House Jesse Norman highlights the Prime Minister's contemptuous treatment of the Speaker and demands an apology to him and to the House, and he presses the Leader of the House on the fate of the Defence Investment Plan, which he promised WILL be published. Image Jesse Norman urges Government action on Wiggin pension injustice to force trustees to pay top-ups from surpluses 19 March 2026 Jesse Norman urges the Government to intervene in the longstanding injustice perpetrated on pensioners of the Special Metals Wiggin pension fund, by requiring the trustees to use the scheme’s surpluses to provide top-up payments to those affected. Image Jesse Norman urges U-turn on North Sea oil ban to create jobs and cut emissions 19 March 2026 Shadow Leader of the House Jesse Norman criticises the Government’s energy policy as economically and strategically damaging. He calls instead for increased domestic oil and gas production, which he argues would boost jobs, public revenues and national resilience while actually lowering emissions. Image Jesse Norman condemns Government's 'failure of political leadership' on Iran as Gulf allies slam UK’s “slow and weak” response 12 March 2026 Shadow Leader of the House Jesse Norman condemns the failure of political leadership over Iran as our allies in the Gulf criticise this country for its “slow” and “weak” response and the Government attempts to shift the blame to the Chief of Defence Staff. Image Jesse Norman slams PM’s leadership on Iran crisis and improvised legal position 5 March 2026 Shadow Leader of the House Jesse Norman criticises Prime Minister’s leadership over the UK’s response to US and Israeli pre-emptive action against Iran’s nuclear programme. He highlights apparent inconsistencies between the Government’s claim of weeks of preparations and reports of last-minute indecision, and questions whether Ministers are improvising the legal position as they go along. Image Jesse Norman praises We are Farming Minds charity and 142-mile walk for farmers' mental health 12 February 2026 Shadow Leader of the House of Commons Jesse Norman pays tribute to his constituents Sam and Emily Stables, who set up a brilliant charity called We are Farming Minds in Herefordshire and highlights Sam’s 142 mile walk from Ross-on-Wye to London in support of farmers' mental health. Image Jesse Norman pays tribute to Epstein victims and demands transparency on Mandelson vetting presented to PM 5 February 2026 Shadow Leader of the House Jesse Norman pays tribute to the young women and girls who were systematically trafficked and abused by Jeffrey Epstein. Regarding Peter Mandelson’s relationship with Epstein, he called for all documents provided to the Intelligence and Security Committee on Mandelson’s appointments to high office to be unredacted, and for the Cabinet Secretary to review the appointment procedures to explain why they failed so catastrophically in this case. Image Jesse Norman calls out £8.2bn–£9bn cost of Government U-turns, and falling Police numbers 29 January 2026 Shadow Leader Jesse Norman exposes the high cost of Government U-turns since July 2024 which have created economic uncertainty
